name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Participants

VARIABLES participantStates, messages, coordinatorState
TypeOK ==
  /\ coordinatorState \in {"Init", "Prepare", "Commit", "Abort"}
  /\ participantStates \in [Participants -> {"Init", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}]
  /\ messages \in [Participants -> {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}]

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
  /\ coordinatorState = "Init"
  /\ participantStates = [p \in Participants |-> "Init"]
  /\ messages = [p \in Participants |-> "Prepare"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
  /\ coordinatorState' = 
       IF coordinatorState = "Init" /\ \A p \in Participants : messages[p] = "Prepare"
       THEN "Prepare"

       THEN "Commit"

       THEN "Abort"

  /\ participantStates' = 
       [p \in Participants |-> 
          IF messages[p] = "Prepare" /\ participantStates[p] = "Init"
          THEN "VoteYes"

          THEN "VoteNo"

          THEN "Commit"

          THEN "Abort"

  /\ messages' = 
       [p \in Participants |-> 
          IF coordinatorState' = "Commit" /\ messages[p] = "Prepare"
          THEN "Commit"

          THEN "Abort"

  /\ UNCHANGED <<coordinatorState, participantStates, messages>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<coordinatorState, participantStates, messages>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Fork ownership: forks[i] = j means fork i is held by philosopher j; forks[i] = -1 means fork i is free *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -1]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                /\ states[i] = "thinking"
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
                /\ forks' = forks
        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                /\ states[i] = "hungry"
                /\ forks[i] = -1
                /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = -1
                /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N) + 1] = i]
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks after eating *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                /\ states[i] = "eating"
                /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = -1, ![%(i, N) + 1] = -1]
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y

VARIABLES num, flag, maxFlag, maxNum

Init == /\ num = 0
       /\ flag = 0
       /\ maxFlag = 0
       /\ maxNum = 0

Next == /\ num' = IF flag' THEN num ELSE num' + 1
       /\ flag' = IF flag THEN flag ELSE flag' + 1
       /\ maxNum' = IF maxFlag' THEN maxNum ELSE maxNum' + 1
       /\ maxFlag' = IF maxFlag THEN maxFlag ELSE maxFlag' + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag, maxFlag, maxNum>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 0
        /\ tail = 0
        /\ count = 0

ProducerAction == /\ count < K
                 /\ head' = head
                 /\ tail' = (tail + 1) \mod K
                 /\ q' = Append(q, head)
                 /\ count' = count + 1

ConsumerAction == /\ count > 0
                 /\ head' = (head + 1) \mod K
                 /\ tail' = tail
                 /\ q' = Tail(q)
                 /\ count' = count - 1

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

TypeOK == /\ K \in Nat
          /\ K > 0
          /\ q \in Seq(0..K-1)
          /\ head \in 0..K-1
          /\ tail \in 0..K-1
          /\ count \in 0..K

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_LOSS_PROBABILITY, FiniteSet, Subset
VARIABLES channel, chunks, file, retransmit_count, sent_chunks

    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ chunks \in Seq
    /\ sent_chunks \in FiniteSet
    /\ retransmit_count \in FiniteSet
    /\ channel \in FiniteSet

Init ==
    /\ file = <<>>
    /\ chunks = <<>>
    /\ sent_chunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmit_count = <<>>
    /\ channel = <<>>

Next ==
    /\ \E chunk \in Seq :
        /\ chunk \in Subset(CHUNK_SIZE)
        /\ chunk \notin sent_chunks
        /\ \E loss \in {TRUE, FALSE}
            /\ loss = (Random < CHANNEL_LOSS_PROBABILITY)
            /\ IF loss
                THEN /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks \cup {chunk}
                     /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count \cup {chunk}
                     /\ channel' = channel \cup {chunk}

                     /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count
                     /\ channel' = channel
    /\ \E chunk \in sent_chunks :
        /\ \E loss \in {TRUE, FALSE}
            /\ loss = (Random < CHANNEL_LOSS_PROBABILITY)
            /\ IF loss
                THEN /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks \cup {chunk}
                     /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count \cup {chunk}
                     /\ channel' = channel \cup {chunk}

                     /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count
                     /\ channel' = channel
    /\ \E chunk \in retransmit_count :
        /\ \E loss \in {TRUE, FALSE}
            /\ loss = (Random < CHANNEL_LOSS_PROBABILITY)
            /\ IF loss
                THEN /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks \cup {chunk}
                     /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count \cup {chunk}
                     /\ channel' = channel \cup {chunk}

                     /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count
                     /\ channel' = channel

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sent_chunks, retransmit_count, channel>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [x \in {1,2} |-> FALSE]
      /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
      \/ /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
      \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag
      \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = flag
      \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Clients

VARIABLE free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Clients:
          /\ c \in free
          /\ free' = free \ {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {c}]
        \/ \E c \in Clients:
          /\ c \in allocated
          /\ free' = free \cup {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {c}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients: allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients: \A p \in allocated[c]: p \in Pages
          /\ \A c1, c2 \in Clients: c1 # c2 => allocated[c1] # allocated[c2]
          /\ \A p \in Pages: \A c1, c2 \in Clients: p \in allocated[c1] /\ p \in allocated[c2] => c1 = c2
